samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data to 16-bit data.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input data valid signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output data valid signal.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>Parameter Description: None.</parameter_description>
    <logic_description>Uses a flag to indicate when the first input data is received. If valid_in is high and the flag is low, data_in is stored in data_lock. If valid_in is high and the flag is high, data_out is updated with the concatenation of data_lock and data_in. The flag is set to 1 after the first input data is received.</logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The data_out register is triggered on the positive edge of the clock signal (posedge clk) or the negative edge of the reset signal (negedge rst_n). On reset, indicated by !rst_n, the data_out register is cleared to 0. On the positive edge of the clock, if valid_in is high and the flag is low, data_in is stored in data_lock. If valid_in is high and the flag is high, data_out is updated with the concatenation of data_lock and data_in. The flag is set to 1 after the first input data is received.
    </implementation>
</module>
